reviews.title: Work well for online meetings
reviews.text: My school district is purchasing a set of 50 for my yearbook classroom where my science students spend a fair amount of time.  This one was purchased to try out at home.  Sound quality is good and mic quality isn't bad, either.  After wearing them for an hour, my ears really need a break, though - but I have a pretty big head; these should be more comfortable for my middle schoolers.  I wish they came with a blue accent as an option, though.  The ones at school will have the green accents.

reviews.title: [review for non ANC version] Pretty good deal for it's money
reviews.text:
I lost accurate track of time, but it was definitely more than 60hr of battery life. very impressive, a little scary to carry this much power on my head, but logically I understand that risks of catching fire or batteries exploding is negligible)

* sound quality - awesome (in terms of sound itself)
* build and material quality - impressive
* bluetooth connectivity - awesome. range, stability, reconnect speed, sound quality (in terms of losses via bluetooth while in varying range of "hotspot with music").
* battery quality - a little bit over a week of daily uses for 8hr+ a day. just perfect. That will be enough for a business trip out of town for a couple of days and back without need to recharge and sometimes even without prior notice to recharge before I go.
* distinct controls (bumps with space between them) - awesome. easy to use, easy to locate, no mistakes)
* folding capabilities - they do fold/unfold, but I tried it only once upon unpacking, but I rarely use this feature

The only minus that I can see in the last 20 days is how the headband is stretching when I'm wearing headphones. Looks dangerous (in terms of longevity). That's all I think. If this headphones will last more than a year I would call them perfect for a price and capabilities (tiny note about non ANC version and that's it)

So final score (while they last) 10/10

reviews.title: It is not passive soundproofing it is active. Which is NOT what I need.
reviews.text:
I have difficulty finding headphones with passive noise canceling for whatever reason and so I saw that this listing said passive and it was from the same brand as one I am still using. (It's breaking down due to age)

Active soundproofing is extremely detrimental to someone with audio disorders like myself since it makes a low buzzing noise that I can't tune out.

It does work as headphones but I would like to have it refunded so I can get another pair with the format of soundproofing I need.

reviews.text: AWESOME headphones for music or phone calls!! Pairs up with my phone, usually within seconds. I listen to tons of YouTube music videos with these and the sound rivals more expensive sets. For the price on these you just can't go wrong!! Battery life is amazing too!!!

reviews.text: The reviews raved about this, but I got a different pair. There was no clip, the packaging boasted 10 hours of bluetooth. The mic didn't work for phone calls (too fuzzy). I returned these. I think their getting rid of a later edition of these headphones that aren't as good as the ones they've previously sold. You can see other reviews saying the same thing. There's no noise cancelation either. So yeah, I think they're just lying about the ones they send you.

reviews.title: ... used it I got complaints of how I sounded like I was in a
reviews.text: The first time I used it I got complaints of how I sounded like I was in a tunnel

reviews.title: These Don't last.
reviews.text:
I was pretty sad to discover that these literally lasted one road trip from Oregon to Southern California. Roughly 20hrs of drive time so I used them for music and audio books. The sound quality was okay but not great. If we had a lot of road noise I couldn't hear anything on full volume
When I tried to use them for the return trip they were even quieter and the microphone wouldn't do more then a whisper on the other end. We tried multiple phones and multiple carriers to see if that was the issue
Another issue on the 2nd round was the amount of feedback we had on the line when calling or even listening to music. I thought my phone was broken or something till I turned my Bluetooth off and just used my phone speaker. I was really excited for this but won't buy them again.

reviews.title: I do not recommend these earbuds.  They have a serious design flaw.
reviews.text:
I would have easily given these earbuds 4 or 5 stars, if it wasn't for the "low battery" warning. JLAB clearly put no thought into this. Here are my issues:

1) The first low battery warning occurs about 5 minutes before the battery dies . So if you just started your jog, or just got on the bus, you're screwed. With 6 hours of play time, the low battery notification should give you at least 20 minutes notice. Since you are almost always "out and about" when listening to headphones, it would be nice to have enough juice to finish your activity or get where you are going.

2) The low battery message (which is verbal) repeats FREQUENTLY for the brief remainder of your battery life, constantly interrupting your music. This is so annoying you wind up taking the earbuds off.

Since the earbuds are essentially useless once you get the first low battery warning, the warning serves no purpose. Giving the low battery warnings at the 30, 20 and 10 minute marks would be far less annoying and actually give you a chance to get to a charger.

title: Skullcandy Jib True Wireless Earbud with Microphone / 22 Hour Battery Life / Use with iPhone and Android / Best for Gym, and Gaming / Bluetooth Earbud Headphones - Black/Orange
description: Experience total freedom on a budget with Jib True. The newest true wireless earbud from Skullcandy is easy to connect and easy to enjoy. Call, track change, and volume controls are all within close reach through one main button. 22 hours of audio on a single charge means you spend less time recharging and more time enjoying your music. Jib True earbuds are adventure-ready, too. An IPX4 rating means Jib True is sweat- and dust-resistant. You don’t need to worry about damage if a little rain kicks up during your urban or outdoor adventure. Dual microphones make your calls more clear and if you feel like keeping one ear open, you can use either bud ‘solo’ without missing a beat.
features: Supreme Sound - Powered by 6mm drivers the Jib features dynamic audio with gnarly bass and a wide sound range. The earbuds also feature bluetooth 5.0 for a strong signal making sure you can listen to your music or take phone calls interruption free.

22 Hours of Play - With a 55mAh battery in the earbud and 500 mAh in the charging case you'll get a whopping 22 hours of charge total, 6 in the earbuds and 16 in the case. Use the included charging case for on the go charging as well as safe storage for your earbuds.

Dual Microphones - keeping you sounding extra clear while on calls or talking to your best friend Siri. Dual mics also means you can have 1 ear open and 1 earbud in while on calls to keep aware of your surroundings.

Small, Medium, Large Ears - Included in the Jib is 3 different eargel tips to make sure you have comfy noise isolating fit. The earbuds are super lightweight and water/dust resistant perfect for the active person!
Buy With Confidence - 1 year manufacturer's warranty included with the Jib, be sure to wear your earbuds with full confidence.

reviews.title: Tis Loud! Has great bass & long lasting battery!
reviews.text:
Alot of headphones lack good bass and sometimes cuts out, but not this set, these earbuds have great bass without over doing it.

Not a bad price to boot, and they're Skullcandy, nough said

reviews.title: Was expecting more from these
reviews.text: I love Skull Candy. But honestly I was expecting more and a better sound. They actually hurt my ears so they were a no go for me. Gave them to a niece.

reviews.title: I love Skullcandy Products!

reviews.title: Good sound
reviews.text: They sound great. But they don't stay in the ear very well. I would buy this brand again. Maybe not this  Style

reviews.title: Amazing for the price... Great range, sound good.
reviews.text:
Battery latest me my whole work day.

Sound is good enough, bluetooth range is impressive, better then my Samsung buds.

Easy setup.

So far, very happy. Some people say I sound like im in an empy room, but some times it doesnt happen?

I dont know if its true noise canceling, but the buds are tight enough you dont get outside noise.

reviews.title: Very nice
reviews.text: Very nice! Comes with a pen as well!!

reviews.title: Quality case, needs key ring hook or lanyard
reviews.text: This case looks great.  The air pod pro case fits perfectly, and does not slide out.  The top cap piece adheres fine, all without adhesive.  I really wish it were designed to allow a key ring or some sort of lanyard to attach to my keys.  I carry the case in pocket and always fear it falling out.

reviews.title: Outstanding value!
reviews.text: Highly recommended for anyone needing an Air Pod Pro cover!

reviews.title: Fantastic Quality And Presentation!
reviews.text:
MONOCARBON came in hot with this lite weight protective carbon fiber shell. When opening the box I was kind of surprised the presentation looked really nice. In the box was included ( Carbon Fiber Shell, Lanyard, Cards with info on it, even included a little piece of carbon fiber to keep)

The shell weight is about 8 grams, and is 0.6mm thick. The hole cutouts are precise. Seems very durable and looks like it would withstand some drops and help protect from scratches when it's inside your pocket. The include lanyard is a nice touch and it makes use with the built in lanyard spot in the AirPods itself.

I overall would recommend this product for your EDC especially if you like carbon fiber and light weight / non bulky cases.

reviews.title: A very minimal sleek case for the airPods Pro 2
reviews.text:
I have purchased this brand before for my apple watch series 6 titanium, Ive only had the shell for two days before it decided to walk away, or fell off and went byby. There was no adhesion to the watch and little effort will cause it to come off. Thank you guys for your concern about what we think about your product. Great customer service!

With that said, This case is no different with the top half, it will slip off with out you knowing.

They have no adhesive strips like others will include. I guess they have to high of confidence in their product. Nice as it is, I would expect more.

I have purchase thin strip double sided adhesive through amazon to have around when needed. This was no exception.

Now that I had to vent my concern with their product, I was prepared with handling this concern.

The bottom shell is no problem since the opening for the lanyard will secure the bottom shell, I have added a small strip of double sided adhesive to the sides of the top half shell.

These are the most minimal light weight hardshell cases you can buy, the look great and feel’s great and will take any reasonable
punishment you can give it and
protect what is important.

The packaging is nice, too nice, they could have spent less on the box and a little more on protecting the investment, like adhesive. They do have decals in a strip, if this was to prevent cases from slipping off, you could have fooled me. There was no instructions in the box on anything, 🤔.

Don’t let my concern detour you from making the investment.

reviews.title: Some do not work

I haven’t tried them all yet, but I’ve used four so far.
1. Didn’t work on either earpiece
2. Stopped working on one side and then stopped working on both sides
3. Same as #2
4. Only one side worked. Still using this one.

reviews.title: These are junk dont waste your money.
reviews.text: These are junk. Do not purchase. Bought for my middle school class thinking I could seek them cheaply and I have trouble giving them away. Many are broken right of of the package. Absolutely waste of money.

reviews.title: Garbage do not purchase
reviews.text: Extremely cheaply made. The wires are super long and tangle within moments of use. I bought them for my son because he always loses them but he hasn't had a pair last long enough to lose. They're junk don't waste ur money.

reviews.title: Quantity over Quality
reviews.text: You can only hear sound from one side for some of the earbuds, and they're pretty fragile. Trying to untangle one of them ended up with me ripping off some of the plastic and exposing the wires accidentally. I also only received 91 earbuds instead of the promised 100. I would buy again though, just because it's so cheap.

reviews.title: Great Headset at a Cheap Price
reviews.text:
Excellent hands free headset that work great with the Avaya model 9608G phone.
Based on the cheap price, I was not anticipating something that worked this good.
The overall construction is good and the sound quality at both ends is good as well.
Since purchasing the first set, we have purchased several more sets for others in our office. All of which have worked great. Just plug then into the headset jack on the back of the phone and you are ready to go, nothing more to do.
It would have been nice if they offered a headset dual headphones to block out more background noise. I did inquire, but they don't.
Overall, myself and others using them in our office, are happy with them.

reviews.title: Good sound and battery life, touch activated button bad
reviews.text: Overall, this is a good earbud. However, if you hold it in your hand you run the risk of your skin/touch activating the voice commands, it hears a random snippet of what you’re saying and it calls someone from your address book that kinda sorta sounds like what you had said and you have to quickly try to hang up as your phone dials someone you haven’t talked to in 5 years, you whispering “oh f*** nononono” over and over until it hangs up and you pray it didn’t actually connect on their side but it does every damn time and then you’re forced into a conversation of pleasantries. So like...yeah it works well, good range but the touch activated button was a big no from me.

reviews.title: Can wear one at a time. Lasts a long time.
reviews.text: Absolutely adore these. Not one person looked at it in my ear and I can use one at a time. Love these!

reviews.title: Great for outside work
reviews.text:
Was wearing these when taking down Christmas decorations and listening to an audio book.

My neighbor thought it was ignoring him but I just didn’t hear him - these have good noise cancellation. Sound quality was great too.

reviews.title: Solid Value
reviews.text: Regular ear buds don't fit in my ears so I need the "wings." I am very happy with how they perform but they are not as "full range" as more expensive brands.

reviews.title: Good customer service
reviews.text: I had some issues with my first set and the customer service was awesome. I appreciate a company that will backup their products.

reviews.title: Love these
reviews.text: These are comfortable and easy to use. Good sound as well.

reviews.title: Good sound quality
reviews.text:
These are good quality but my left ear is uncomfortable. My ear must be a different shape. I was hoping the battery life would be better, but its ok. I use it to listen to books while i work. Take calls when needed.
Most bluetooth headsets have a delay or echo. These do not. It makes phone calls very clear.
These are the best sound quality of all but my Dewalt headsets.
The battery lasts about 5 to 6 hours with my streaming usage. Probably last much longer with just calls.
My left ear hurts after a couple hours, but ny right ear is fine for all day.
They charge quickly about an hour maybe a little more.
DON'T MISPLACE THE CHARGING CASE they will become worthless. They can't be charged without it.
And it seems if they power off by themselves they have to be reset in the case.
All that being said i probably would buy them again.

title: [2 Pack] Airtag Keychain for Apple Air Tag Holder IPX8 Waterproof 360 Full Body Shockproof Protective Cover Case Scratch Resistant for Pets, Dog, Keys, Cat, Luggage-Black
features: 【Compatibility】Exclusively designed airtag holder for newly released Apple Airtag 2021 (Note: Airtag is not included).

【IPX8 Water Tolerance】This airtag keychain holder takes advantage of IPX8 waterproof: no water leakage or penetration or damage even 6m(20ft) deep underwater. It becomes durable to sweat, rain, wash, and daily laundry, making it washable when it is stained with dust or dirt.

【Shockproof & Full-body Protection】Made from the hybrid material of PC and TPU, makes your Airtag invulnerable. Equip this as armor to the air tag keychain to prevent scratches, drops, shocks, and damage from every corner.

【Portable & Stylish Looking】This airtag case, simple but protective, adds more eye-catching help you find your belongings, like bags, luggage, and keys. Easy to install and dispart. You can attach it to whatever belongings you like.

【One-step Installation& Use Occasion】Four steps is quite enough to cover your Airtag with such an extraordinary case.Attachable to car key, backpack, schoolbag, dog leash, and other belongings you want to track. Easily attach your airtag to the things you want to keep track of.

reviews.title: Pros and Cons
reviews.text: Pros:  I really like these holders.  I would give it a 5 star if they were all alike.  two are as demoed in the video and two are totally different.  Cons:  The two white/clear holders are totally different from the blamk and pink.  The clear back just snaps on, and does not completely close and lock with the circle ring.  If it snaps apart, you could loose the airtag!!!  I decided to keep them because I do like the pink and black.  I put the other two in my car in case it was stolen.  The other two I can put on my key ring.  Very nice holder, just wish all four were like the pink and black.  It does NOT show this in the demo video.

reviews.title: When used worked well
reviews.text: I didn't use these long but feel like they would work great.

reviews.title: Works great.
reviews.text: It's attractive enough, stays in place, and looks like it will last. There really isn't a lot to add.

reviews.title: For my son’s gaming headset...
reviews.text: This little contraption is quite awesome. Bought it for the headset my son uses while playing video games. Was tired of finding his headset left on the floor, so attached this to his entertainment center and now he hangs his $100 headset on this (up off the floor where it won’t get stepped on/ damaged).  Solid construction. Easy install (no holes, no tools/ other hardware required).

reviews.title: Great purchase
reviews.text: It was just a tad bit too small for where I wanted it,  but I found the perfect spot on the printer stand next to the desk. Very well made.  Not just a cheap piece of plastic.  Strong and sturdy. Folds up out of the way when not in use.

reviews.title: This Gadget is Great!
reviews.text: Love this thing! Put it under my desk to hold my purse. How easy can it be?! Slide it on. Tighten it securely. Add purse. Done and done! Nice quality, too…not cheesy or flimsy.

reviews.title: Great and well made
reviews.text: This thing is great and well made from metal.  This is my second one.  It cost more than the plastics ones, but it is very well made.  The holder folds up once you have it clamped to a desk to shelf.  It is strong and supports heavy headphones well.  It is a little expensive but well worth the investment.
